processors.description: Cisco IOS syslog — extract facility, severity level, mnemonic
processors.sampleData: *Apr 14 10:23:45.123: %LINK-3-UPDOWN: Interface GigabitEthernet0/1, changed state to down

dql.script:
parse content, """LD '%' LD:syslog_facility '-' INT:syslog_severity '-' LD:syslog_mnemonic ':' SPACE LD:syslog_message"""
| fieldsAdd network.log_type = "syslog"

processors.description: Cisco ASA syslog — extract ASA level and message ID
processors.sampleData: %ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection 839201 for outside:192.0.2.100/54321 to inside:198.51.100.50/443

dql.script:
parse content, """'%ASA-' INT:asa_level '-' LD:asa_msgid ':' SPACE LD:asa_message"""
| fieldsAdd network.log_type = "firewall"

processors.description: Palo Alto PAN-OS CSV — extract log type (TRAFFIC/THREAT/SYSTEM)

dql.script:
parse content, """INT ',' LD:pa_timestamp ',' LD:pa_serial ',' LD:pa_log_type ',' LD:pa_subtype ',' LD"""
| fieldsAdd network.log_type = lower(pa_log_type)

processors.description: Fortinet FortiOS key-value — extract type, subtype, action
processors.sampleData: date=2026-04-14 time=10:23:45 devname="hq-fg-01" type="traffic" subtype="forward" action="accept"

dql.script:
parse content, """LD 'type="' LD:fg_type '"' LD"""
| parse content, """LD 'subtype="' LD:fg_subtype '"' LD"""
| parse content, """LD 'action="' LD:fg_action '"' LD"""
| parse content, """LD 'level="' LD:fg_level '"' LD"""
| fieldsAdd network.log_type = fg_type

processors.description: Network heartbeat - extracts tick count and interface count

dql.script:
parse content, """LD:device_name ': heartbeat tick=' INT:heartbeat_tick SPACE LD:device_state ' interfaces=' INT:interface_count"""
| fieldsAdd network.log_type = "heartbeat"

processors.description: Epic SIEM XML — extracts E1Mid, Action, EMPid, IP, clinical fields, service audit fields, login auth fields, site

dql.script:
parse content, """LD ']' SPACE XML:xml"""
| fieldsAdd E1Mid = xml[EventLog][E1Mid], Action = xml[EventLog][Action], Source = xml[EventLog][Source], WorkstationID = xml[EventLog][LWSid], Flag = xml[EventLog][Flag]
| fieldsAdd epic_emp_raw = toString(xml[EventLog][EMPid])
| parse epic_emp_raw, """INT:EMPID '^' LD:EMPid '^' LD:USERNAME"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="IP"><Value>' LD:IP '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="CLIENTNAME"><Value>' LD:CLIENTNAME '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SERVICENAME"><Value>' LD:SERVICENAME '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SERVICECATEGORY"><Value>' LD:SERVICECATEGORY '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="DEPARTMENT"><Value>' LD:DEPARTMENT '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="ORDER_TYPE"><Value>' LD:ORDER_TYPE '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="NOTE_TYPE"><Value>' LD:NOTE_TYPE '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="MEDICATION_NAME"><Value>' LD:MEDICATION_NAME '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="PATIENT_MRN"><Value>' LD:PATIENT_MRN '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="PLATFORM"><Value>' LD:device_type '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SESSION_ID"><Value>' LD:SESSION_ID '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SERVICETYPE"><Value>' LD:SERVICETYPE '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="HOSTNAME"><Value>' LD:HOSTNAME '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="INSTANCEURN"><Value>' LD:INSTANCEURN '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SERVICE_USER"><Value>' LD:SERVICE_USER '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SERVICE_USERTYP"><Value>' LD:SERVICE_USERTYP '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="CLIENT_TYPE"><Value>' LD:CLIENT_TYPE '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="LOGINERROR"><Value>' LD:LOGINERROR '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="LOGIN_CONTEXT"><Value>' LD:LOGIN_CONTEXT '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="LOGIN_LDAP_ID"><Value>' LD:LOGIN_LDAP_ID '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="INTERNET_AREA"><Value>' LD:INTERNET_AREA '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="HYP_ACCESS_ID"><Value>' LD:HYP_ACCESS_ID '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="REMOTE_IP"><Value>' LD:REMOTE_IP '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="UID"><Value>' LD:UID '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Name="SOURCE"><Value>' LD:LOGIN_SOURCE '</Value>'"""
| parse content, """LD 'Epic ' INT:SYSLOG_PID ' -'"""
| fieldsAdd patient_portal_action = if(E1Mid == "MYCHART_APPT_SCHEDULE" OR E1Mid == "MYCHART_MESSAGE" OR E1Mid == "MYCHART_PROXY_ACCESS" OR E1Mid == "MYCHART_RX_REFILL", E1Mid)
| fieldsAdd `healthcare.site` = if(endsWith(toString(EMPID), "0") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "1") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "2") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "a") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "b"), "kcrmc-main", else: if(endsWith(toString(EMPID), "3") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "4") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "c"), "tpk-clinic", else: if(endsWith(toString(EMPID), "5") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "6") OR endsWith(toString(EMPID), "d"), "wch-clinic", else: "lwr-clinic")))
| fieldsAdd epic.log_type = "SIEM"

processors.description: Epic ETL — extracts job_name, job_result, duration, records_processed

dql.script:
parse content, "JSON:etl"
| fieldsAdd event = etl[event], job_name = etl[job_name], job_result = etl[status], duration_seconds = etl[duration_seconds], records_processed = etl[rows_processed], source_system = etl[data_source], etl_instance = etl[instance]
| fieldsAdd `healthcare.site` = if(endsWith(toString(records_processed), "0") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "1") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "2") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "a") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "b"), "kcrmc-main", else: if(endsWith(toString(records_processed), "3") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "4") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "c"), "tpk-clinic", else: if(endsWith(toString(records_processed), "5") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "6") OR endsWith(toString(records_processed), "d"), "wch-clinic", else: "lwr-clinic")))
| fieldsAdd `epic.log_type` = "ETL"
| fieldsRemove etl

processors.description: FHIR API — extracts method, path, response_code, response_time_ms, client_id

dql.script:
parse content, """LD '[' LD:fhir_server ']' SPACE LD:method SPACE LD:path SPACE LD:response_code SPACE INT:response_time_ms 'ms' SPACE 'correlationId=' LD:correlation_id SPACE 'client=' LD:client_id SPACE 'src=' IPADDR:src_ip"""
| fieldsAdd `healthcare.site` = if(endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "0") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "1") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "2") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "a") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "b"), "kcrmc-main", else: if(endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "3") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "4") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "c"), "tpk-clinic", else: if(endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "5") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "6") OR endsWith(toString(correlation_id), "d"), "wch-clinic", else: "lwr-clinic")))
| fieldsAdd `epic.log_type` = "FHIR_API"

processors.description: HL7 v2 — extracts MSH.9 message type, MSH.10 control ID

dql.script:
parse content, """'MSH|' LD '|' LD:hl7_sending_app '|' LD:hl7_sending_facility '|' LD:hl7_receiving_app '|' LD:hl7_receiving_facility '|' LD '||' LD:hl7_msg_type '|' LD:hl7_msg_control_id '|' LD:hl7_processing_id '|' LD:hl7_version"""
| fieldsAdd `MSH.9` = hl7_msg_type, `MSH.10` = hl7_msg_control_id
| fieldsAdd `healthcare.site` = if(endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "0") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "1") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "2") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "a") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "b"), "kcrmc-main", else: if(endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "3") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "4") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "c"), "tpk-clinic", else: if(endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "5") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "6") OR endsWith(toString(hl7_msg_control_id), "d"), "wch-clinic", else: "lwr-clinic")))
| fieldsAdd `epic.log_type` = "HL7"

processors.description: FHIR Resource — extracts resourceType and resource ID

dql.script:
parse content, "JSON:fhir"
| fieldsAdd fhir_resource_type = fhir[resourceType], fhir_resource_id = fhir[id]
| fieldsAdd `healthcare.site` = if(endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "0") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "1") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "2") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "a") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "b"), "kcrmc-main", else: if(endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "3") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "4") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "c"), "tpk-clinic", else: if(endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "5") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "6") OR endsWith(toString(fhir_resource_id), "d"), "wch-clinic", else: "lwr-clinic")))
| fieldsAdd `epic.log_type` = "FHIR_RESOURCE"
| fieldsRemove fhir
